title: O.R.I.O.N
abstract: A patented integrated AI-driven inventory management and demand forecasting platform creating a closed-loop intelligence network between household consumption and retail stock management with cultural-aware forecasting.
claims: Recipe-based household consumption modeling driving retail demand signals
Cultural-aware forecasting with festival peak seasonality markers
Customer persona segmentation for targeted merchandising
Anomaly detection for flash-demand and bulk-buy events
Containerized model execution with CI/CD monthly retraining
